figures.caption: Figure 1: Overall framework. Left: MeanFlow training in latent space using VAE latents as targets. Middle: refinement during finetuning using waveform-domain losses on audio reconstructed from generated latents. Right: inference uses the same one-step sampling plus VAE decoding, with either the original or refined decoder.
Table 2: Ablation studies (140M DiT, Joint-FT unless noted). MOS: mean±95% CI.
